step_name: Perform bias testing and model validation

subprocess_flow.description: This sub-step involves the setup and configuration of the technical environment required for model validation. The Risk Management Team ensures that all automated bias testing tools and standardized validation suites are correctly installed and integrated with the model's architecture to ensure consistent testing conditions.
success_criteria: Validation tools are operational and connected to the model environment.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure a stable and standardized environment for technical accuracy checks.
subprocess_flow.scope: Technical environment setup and tool configuration.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Standardized setup checklists and environment verification tests.

change_management.change_request_process: Submit ticket to IT/DevOps for environment changes.
change_management.versioning_rules: Track environment configuration versions in Git.

subprocess_flow.description: The team establishes quantitative benchmarks for fairness and accuracy based on internal policies and regulatory requirements. This involves selecting specific metrics such as disparate impact ratios, equalized odds, and precision-recall thresholds that the model must satisfy to pass validation.
success_criteria: Benchmarks are documented and approved by the Head of AI Governance.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To establish clear pass/fail criteria for the validation process.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Peer review of benchmarks by the AI Ethics Committee.

change_management.change_request_process: Formal review by the Risk Management lead.
change_management.versioning_rules: Threshold documents are versioned in the Model Inventory System.

subprocess_flow.description: Using the configured environment, the team runs automated fairness audits against the training datasets and model outputs. This process identifies potential biases across protected attributes and generates detailed scores for each selected fairness metric.
success_criteria: Bias testing suite completes without errors and generates a full results set.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To identify and quantify algorithmic bias using automated tools.
end_conditions: Bias scores are recorded for all protected attributes.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Data profiling to ensure all protected classes are represented in the test set.

change_management.change_request_process: Request for additional test data via Data Governance team.
change_management.versioning_rules: Test results are timestamped and linked to model versions.

subprocess_flow.description: The team performs rigorous technical validation to ensure the model meets performance requirements. This includes calculating accuracy, F1-scores, and AUC-ROC, as well as conducting stress tests and robustness checks to ensure the model remains stable under varying data conditions.
success_criteria: Model performance metrics meet or exceed the defined thresholds.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the model is technically sound and reliable.
end_conditions: Performance metrics are finalized and documented.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Use of independent hold-out sets and cross-validation techniques.

change_management.change_request_process: Model retraining request if performance is insufficient.
change_management.versioning_rules: Performance logs are stored in the centralized model repository.

subprocess_flow.description: The Risk Management Team reviews the intersection of bias results and technical performance. They analyze whether achieving fairness requires adjustments that significantly degrade accuracy and determine if the current model balance is acceptable under regulatory guidelines.
success_criteria: Analysis clearly identifies the impact of bias mitigation on model utility.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To make informed decisions regarding model optimization and fairness.
triggers: Completion of bias and accuracy testing.
end_conditions: Analysis summary is signed off by the Risk Management lead.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Standardized analysis templates and multi-stakeholder review.

change_management.change_request_process: Escalation to AI Ethics Committee for unresolved trade-offs.

subprocess_flow.description: The final sub-step involves compiling all testing results, analysis summaries, and compliance evidence into a comprehensive Model Validation Report. This report provides the formal confirmation that the model meets all internal and regulatory benchmarks for fairness and accuracy.
success_criteria: Validation report confirms model meets all internal and regulatory benchmarks.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide a formal audit trail and certification of model compliance.
end_conditions: Model Validation Report is published and archived.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Automated report generation from validated data sources.

change_management.versioning_rules: Final reports are locked and archived with unique version IDs.
